commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=22298446c196dadff13f15d276f7a13211b06885)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent failover classification so 429 messages with overload wording return `overloaded` instead of `rate_limit` and adds matcher regression tests.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +44. Total +58 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current `main` has a broad 429 rate-limit matcher before the overload matcher and the explicit 429 status branch returns `rate_limit` after billing checks. I did not run a live provider or local runtime repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor follow-up is needed for after-fix real behavior proof and the inaccurate provenance reference; automation cannot supply the contributor-environment proof gate.

target.title: fix: classify HTTP 429 'temporarily overloaded' as overloaded, not rate_limit
target.author: chunkypanda29

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
